    1. Constant Field Values
      1. dataaccess.*

    Constant Field Values

    dataaccess.*

    • dataaccess.CustomerDataAccessImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      DELETE
      "delete from customers where customerNumber=?"
      private static final String
      INSERT
      "insert into customers(customerNumber, customerName, contactLastName, contactFirstName, phone, addressLine1, addressLine2, city, state, postalCode, country, salesRepEmployeeNumber, creditLimit) values(?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)"
      private static final String
      QUERY_BY_ID
      "select * from customers where customerNumber=?"
      private static final String
      QUERY_COUNT
      "select count(*) from customers"
      private static final String
      QUERY_FIND_ALL
      "select * from customers"
      private static final String
      UPDATE
      "update customers set customerNumber=?, customerName=?, contactLastName=?, contactFirstName=?, phone=?, addressLine1=?, addressLine2=?, city=?, state=?, postalCode=?, country=?, salesRepEmployeeNumber=?, creditLimit=? where customerNumber=?"
    • dataaccess.EmployeeDataAccessImpl
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      BY_ID_QUERY
      "Select * from employees where employeeNumber = ?"
      private static final String
      COUNT_ALL
      "Select count(*) from employees"
      private static final String
      DELETE_BY_ID
      "Delete from employees where employeeNumber = ? "
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL_QUERY
      "Select * from employees"
      private static final String
      INSERT_EMPLOYEE
      "Insert into employees (employeeNumber, lastName, firstName, extension, email, officeCode, reportsTo, jobTitle)\nValues (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n"
      private static final String
      UPDATE_EMPLOYEE
      "UPDATE employees\nSET lastName = ?, firstName = ?, extension = ?, email = ?, officeCode = ?, reportsTo = ?, jobTitle = ?\nWHERE employeeNumber = ?\n"

      Constant Field
      Value
      private static final String
      BY_ID_QUERY
      "Select * from orders where orderNumber = ?"
      private static final String
      COUNT_ALL
      "Select count(*) from orders"
      private static final String
      DELETE_BY_ID
      "Delete from orders where orderNumber = ? "
      private static final String
      FIND_ALL_QUERY
      "Select * from orders"
      private static final String
      INSERT_ORDER
      "Insert into orders (orderDate, requiredDate, status, comments, customerNumber)\nValues (?, ?, \'In Process\', ?, ?)\n"
      private static final String
      INSERT_ORDER_DETAILS
      "INSERT INTO orderdetails (productCode, quantityOrdered, priceEach) VALUES (?, ?, ?)"
